programme.desc: Leanfaidh Sharon agus Caoilinn lena dturas agus casfaidh siad le Mundy i bPort Omna. (Sharon & Caoilinn continue their journey of the Heartlands and meet Mundy in Portumna.)

programme.title: Timpeall na Tíre
programme.desc: Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)

programme.title: France 24
programme.desc: Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Bréidín & Clúmh
programme.desc: Cuirtear an croí trasna i gClúmh nuair a fheiceann sé scáth ar an bpuball. (A shadow on the tent spooks Fluff and threatens to spoil Tweedy's camping plan!)

programme.title: CoComelon It's Cody Time
programme.desc: Má tá tú sona sásta, buail do bhosa! (If you're happy and you know it, clap your hands!)

programme.title: CoComelon JJ's Animal
programme.desc: Tá JJ agus Mochi an Moncaí ag dul ag snámh! (JJ and Mochi the Monkey are going for a swim!)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Bíonn spraoi ag na Dathanna ag meascadh lena chéile. (The Colours have fun mixing together.)

programme.title: Bíp Bíp Cory Carson
programme.desc: Tá an t-Uasal Traenach bailithe i bhfostú ar na ráillí! (Mr. Coaltrain find himself in a pickle when he gets stuck on the tracks!)

programme.title: Pramsáil
programme.desc: Deir Mam go gcaithfidh Caitríona agus Roy dul a chodladh luath ach níl baol orthu! (Mam said that Caitríona and Roy have to go to bed early, but they have other ideas.)

programme.title: Elmo Anseo
programme.desc: Ag foghlaim faoi mhapaí a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about maps today.)

programme.title: Elmo Anseo
programme.desc: Ag foghlaim chun é féin a ghléasadh a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about getting dressed.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Níl a fhios ag Zac cén chaoi is fearr dó cairde a dhéanamh. (Zac wants to make friends with Mo but doesn't know how.)

programme.title: Olobob Top
programme.desc: Tugann Norbet leis babhla sméara na hOlobobanna trí thimpiste. (Norbet accidentally takes the key ingredient for the Olobob's cake.)

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Tagann na diabhailíní ar fad le chéile chun na PJ Masks a chloí. (All the villains (not the wolfies) join forces to defeat the PJ Masks forever.)

programme.title: Wussywat
programme.desc: Tá Wussywat ag iarraidh na potaí a thógáil as an mbealach sa ghairdín ach tá siad trom. (Wussywat wants to move a pile of pots from the garden but they are heavy.)

programme.title: Clifford
programme.desc: Tá imní ar Clifford faoin méid a dúirt bean feasa leis ag aonach siamsaíochta. (Clifford becomes worried after getting his fortune told at the Birdwell Fun Fair.)

programme.title: Woozle & Pip
programme.desc: Níl Pip ag iarraidh cnámh a roinnt le Woozle. (Pip doesn't want to share a bone with Woozle.)

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Téann Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex óga ar eachtra faoi uisce. (Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes go on an underwater adventure inside a rubbery bubble.)

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Ceannaíonn Dot agus Mam gaireas do Dheaide do Lá na nAithreacha. (Dot and Mom surprise Dad with a fancy hands-free assistant device for Father's Day.)

programme.title: Ella Bella Bingo
programme.desc: Caithfidh an tUasal Jackson rothar Henry a dheisiú, ach is cosúil go bhfuil a chuid uirlisí ar iarraidh. (Mr Jackson needs to fix Henry's bike.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Charlie agus Lola
programme.desc: Tá jabanna beaga le déanamh ag Charlie agus Lola. (Mammy has told Charlie and Lola that they must do many chores.)

programme.title: Petronix Defenders
programme.desc: Tá an Banphrionsa Petswiper ag iarraidh peata cóála. (Princess Petswiper wants a koala for a pet.)

programme.title: Pat an Madra
programme.desc: Tagann Sadie ar lámhainn dhraíochta. (Sadie obtains a magic glove which can change the ordinary door you're opening into a portal into another room.)

programme.title: Angelo Rules
programme.desc: Féachann Angelo le cleas draíochta nua a dhéanamh. (Angelo decides to create a new magic trick.)

programme.title: Dónall Dána
programme.desc: Diúltaíonn Dónall dul ar scoil agus a bheith dána! (Dónall Dána refuses to go to school or be bold!)

programme.title: Cúla4

programme.title: Super Simple Amhráin
programme.desc: Amhrán spraíúil faoi uachtar reoite brocailí a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about broccoli ice cream.)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha
programme.desc: Déanann Naoi Déag roinnt cruthanna craiceáilte. (Nineteen makes some crazy shapes.)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Baineann Gorm triail as bia nua le cabhair ón chairde. (Blue tries some new foods today, with some help from his friends.)

programme.title: Na Blociontais
programme.desc: Tá ár gcairde ag iarraidh breathnú ar scannán, ach an mbeidh Gabh agus Stop in ann é a chur ar siúl? (It's film night, but how can Go and Stop get the movie to start?)

programme.title: Pompon An Béirín Beag
programme.desc: Tá Pompon agus Rita ag iarraidh baile nua a fháil do na seangáin sa bhforaois. (Join Pompon and Rita on an adventure to find the ants a new home in the forest.)

programme.title: Scéal an Lae
programme.desc: Is é Seán Mistéil a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Seán Mistéil.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Faigheann Pip agus Posy bréagáin a bhí ag Frankie. (Pip and Posy get hand-me-down toys from Frankie.)

programme.title: Scoil Bheag Helen
programme.desc: Tá Clóra ag streachailt go mór páirt a ghlacadh i ngníomhaíocht an lae inniu. (Clóra's having real difficulty taking part in today's activity.)

programme.title: Scoil Bheag Helen
programme.desc: Imríonn Helen cispheil leis na bréagáin. (Helen takes the toys out to play basketball.)

programme.title: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programme.desc: Tá an lá agus an oíche tagtha in éineacht i gCathair an Bhogha Ceatha. (When Day and Night come together it creates a huge problem in Rainbow City.)

programme.title: Nuair a Bheidh Mé Mór

programme.title: Zou

programme.title: Dee Dee

programme.title: An Siopa Ealaíne

programme.title: Murder She Wrote
